name: jellyfin
description: Media server for streaming your movies and TV library

fields.name: JELLYFIN_CONFIG_LOCATION
fields.label: Jellyfin Config Folder
fields.help: Stores Jellyfin configuration, database, metadata, and application state. This can grow large for bigger libraries.

fields.name: TV_LOCATION
fields.label: TV Library Folder
fields.help: Folder containing your TV library.

fields.name: MOVIES_LOCATION
fields.label: Movies Library Folder
fields.help: Folder containing your movies library.

fields.name: PUID
fields.label: PUID
fields.help: User ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: PGID
fields.label: PGID
fields.help: Group ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_PORT
fields.label: HTTP App Port
fields.help: Host port used to open Jellyfin in your browser.

fields.name: TZ
fields.label: Timezone
fields.help:
Timezone used by Jellyfin logs and scheduled tasks.
Example: Asia/Dubai.

fields.name: RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the container restarts automatically.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_NETWORK_MODE
fields.label: Network
fields.help: Choose Create New Bridge for the default Compose network, Host Mode for host networking, or an existing named Docker network.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_IMAGE
fields.label: Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for Jellyfin.
Change this only if you want a different tag or image source.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_PUBLISHED_SERVER_URL
fields.label: Published Server URL
fields.help:
Optional autodiscovery URL or IP address including http:// or https://.
Example: http://192.168.0.5.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_HTTP_PORT_MAPPING
fields.label: HTTP Port Mapping
fields.help: Primary Jellyfin HTTP port mapping used when not running in host mode.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_HTTPS_PORT_MAPPING
fields.label: HTTPS Port Mapping
fields.help:
Optional HTTPS port mapping in the format 8920:8920.
Leave blank unless you have set up Jellyfin HTTPS certificates inside the container.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_DISCOVERY_PORT_7359
fields.label: Client Discovery Port
fields.help: Optional client discovery port for local-network Jellyfin discovery.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_DISCOVERY_PORT_1900
fields.label: DLNA Discovery Port
fields.help: Optional DLNA discovery port. LinuxServer notes that client auto-discovery relies on this fixed port.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_DRI_DEVICE
fields.label: Intel/AMD Hardware Acceleration
fields.help: Enable this only when /dev/dri is detected on the Docker host and you want Intel, AMD, or compatible ARM hardware acceleration.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_RUNTIME
fields.label: Container Runtime
fields.help:
Optional runtime override.
For Nvidia hardware acceleration, this is typically nvidia when the Nvidia container toolkit is installed on the host.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_EXTRA_MOUNT_1
fields.label: Extra Mount 1
fields.help: Optional extra media or bind mount in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_EXTRA_MOUNT_2
fields.label: Extra Mount 2
fields.help: Optional extra media or bind mount in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_EXTRA_MOUNT_3
fields.label: Extra Mount 3
fields.help: Optional extra media or bind mount in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_EXTRA_MOUNT_4
fields.label: Extra Mount 4
fields.help: Optional extra media or bind mount in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_EXTRA_MOUNT_5
fields.label: Extra Mount 5
fields.help: Optional extra media or bind mount in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker sets the container name from the project name.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_INTERNAL_HTTP_PORT
fields.label: Internal HTTP Port
fields.help: Recipe-managed Jellyfin internal HTTP port.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_CONFIG_TARGET
fields.label: Config Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal config path.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_TV_TARGET
fields.label: TV Library Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal TV library path.

fields.name: JELLYFIN_MOVIES_TARGET
fields.label: Movies Library Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal movies library path.

ui.overview: Jellyfin lets you stream your movies and TV shows from your own media server.
what_happens: A LinuxServer Jellyfin container will be created
Your config, TV library, and movies library folders will be mounted into the container
Bridge networking is the default LinuxServer setup, with optional HTTPS and discovery ports available under Advanced
You can add more media mounts and optionally enable supported hardware acceleration devices
ui.data_location: Relative paths are stored inside this app's project folder under the mounted EasyDocker base config path.
